nasb.text: Then Balak said to Balaam, “Did I not urgently send to you to call you? Why did you not come to me? Am I really unable to honor you?”

esv.text: And Balak said to Balaam, “Did I not send to you to call you? Why did you not come to me? Am I not able to honor you?”

cnv.text: 巴勒對巴蘭說：“我不是急切地派人到你那裡去請你嗎？你為甚麼不到我這裡來呢？難道我不能使你得尊榮嗎？”

ccb.text: 巴勒对巴兰说：“上次派人请你，你为何不肯来？难道我不能给你重赏吗？”
